items.title: Changelog on landing page
items.description: "What's New" section loads dynamically from changelog.json

items.title: Publish script
items.description: `scripts/publish.sh` — one command to bump version, generate changelog, push, and publish

items.title: Auto-update system
items.description: scheduled task checks ClawHub every 2 hours and installs new versions automatically

items.title: Version display
items.description: current version shown in footer and changelog badge

items.title: Operation safety
items.description: `bitrix24_call.py` now classifies methods as read/write/destructive and requires `--confirm-write` or `--confirm-destructive` flags for data-changing operations

items.title: Auto-pagination
items.description: `--iterate` flag automatically collects all pages from `.list` methods

items.title: JSON params from file
items.description: `--params-file` for complex parameters without shell escaping issues

items.title: Dry-run mode
items.description: `--dry-run` previews what would be called without executing

items.title: File uploads reference
items.description: new `references/files.md` — base64 for CRM, disk+attach for tasks

items.title: API module restrictions
items.description: documented which modules don't work as expected via webhook (telephony, mail, connectors)

items.title: Batch cross-references
items.description: `$result[name]` pattern for chaining commands

items.title: Open Lines reference
items.description: full `imopenlines.*` API coverage — line config, operators, sessions, dialog, CRM integration, bot

items.title: Support triggers
items.description: "поддержка", "обращения", "операторы", "омниканал", "helpdesk" now route to Open Lines

items.title: MCP server link
items.description: Known Limitations sections now point to `https://mcp-dev.bitrix24.tech/mcp` for checking API updates

items.title: Channels reference
items.description: `references/channels.md` — broadcast chats with `ENTITY_TYPE=ANNOUNCEMENT`

items.title: CRM timeline
items.description: timeline comments and log messages in `references/crm.md`

items.title: Chat improvements
items.description: message search, sharing, dialog history

items.title: Disk attachments
items.description: file upload to chat via `im.disk.file.commit`
Batch API support (`bitrix24_batch.py`) — multiple methods in one HTTP request
User ID and timezone caching after `user.current`
7 ready-made scenarios: morning briefing, weekly report, team status, client dossier, meeting prep, day results, sales pipeline
5 scheduled task templates: day plan, morning briefing, evening summary, overdue alert, new leads monitor
Trigger phrases for all domains
Cross-domain search scenario
Smart processes, products, quotes, and sites domain references
Projects, feed, timeman domains
Enhanced org structure reference
Complete rewrite of all references with MCP-verified method names and examples
Interaction rules moved to top of SKILL.md
No technical jargon in user-facing output
GitHub Pages landing site (5 languages: EN, RU, ZH, ES, FR)
OG image and social sharing meta tags
Auto-detect browser language
Dropped env vars — config file is the single webhook source
Webhook stored in `~/.config/bitrix24-skill/config.json`
Improved webhook diagnostics (`check_webhook.py`)
